faqs.question: How quickly can you provide drain fly treatment in East Orange?
faqs.answer: We offer same-day and next-day service to East Orange properties in most cases. Our technicians can typically arrive within 24 hours of your call to assess and begin treating your drain fly infestation, with most treatments completed in a single visit.

faqs.question: What does the $350 – $550 drain fly treatment include?
faqs.answer: Our comprehensive drain fly treatment includes a thorough inspection of all drains and moisture sources, bio-foam application to eliminate larvae, drain cleaning and sanitization, treatment of breeding sites, and a follow-up visit if needed. The final price depends on the severity of the infestation and the number of drains requiring treatment.

faqs.question: Why do I have drain flies in my East Orange property?
faqs.answer: Drain flies thrive in the organic buildup found in sink drains, floor drains, and sewage systems common in East Orange's older buildings. They breed in the gelatinous film inside pipes, particularly in kitchens, bathrooms, and basements. High humidity and moisture issues in this area can also contribute to drain fly populations.

faqs.question: How can I prevent drain flies from returning after treatment?
faqs.answer: Regular drain maintenance is key to preventing drain fly return. We recommend weekly cleaning of drains with enzyme-based cleaners, ensuring proper ventilation in bathrooms and kitchens, fixing any plumbing leaks promptly, and scheduling periodic professional drain treatments. Our technicians will provide customized prevention tips based on your specific property conditions.
